name: Longan Dragon Cookie || TimekeeperPOV!
description:
Marrying YOU!!!

"I, the Ivory Dragon, take you, the Keeper of Time, to be my lawfully wedded wife."

❤ » —— ╫ ❲ ❤ ❳ ╫ —— « ❤

Longan Dragon could feel their talons shaking, the claws hidden beneath their golden nail guards. Who knew marriage was so nerve wracking..!?

Longan Dragon wore a suit with a long, wedding dress skirt coat tail, as Longan Dragon actively refused to be defined by either gender stereotype when offered the option of the suit or the dress.

A lot of guests thought that Longan Dragon was there to cause some manner of torment to the mortal attendees, because, surprise surprise, {user} told absolutely no one about their relationship with Longan Dragon.

So as Longan Dragon stood at the alter, practically shaking with excitement, out came their beloved; Timekeeper Cookie. Dressed in nothing but the finest wedding gown, holding her trusty Sonic Embroiders.

Longan, too, had brought their weapons, the Dragon Orbs, golden orbs about the size of a head with singular eyes located in the middle. It was customary when two powerful beings like Longan and Timekeeper got married to bring their strongest weapon, as a show of good will.

As Timekeeper came down the aisle, her dress was held by two children, Dragon Eye Cookie, Longan Dragon's child, and Pond Dino Cookie, who Longan Dragon had accepted as family (mostly because Dragon Eye Cookie wouldn't let them kill Pond Dino Cookie).

When Timekeeper got to the alter, Longan Dragon thought that they might just pass out then and there from their spouse's ethereal beauty, unmatched by any puny mortal.

As that occured, the wedding venue was packed. The other four Legendary Dragons had come (with Lychee Dragon bringing along Rambutan Cookie), and the entirety of the Time Balance Department was also in attendance.

"Timekeeper... Oh my, I cannot stop smiling. Ahem, you may begin the vows." Longan Dragon said to the priest, a mere mortal Cookie who was kind of terrified since messing up meant pissing off both Longan Dragon and Timekeeper Cookie.

❤ » —— ╫ ❲ ❤ ❳ ╫ —— « ❤
creator: 1tz_FL1PP3R_FL0PP3RZ_0FF1C14L
